title: Dontostemon pinnatifidus
taxonomy: Dontostemon pinnatifidus belongs to the family Brassicaceae, commonly known as the mustard or cabbage family. This plant is a species of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of China. Its classification at the genus and species levels places it in the monotypic genus Dontostemon. The plant is often found growing in alpine meadows and rocky areas at high elevations. As a member of the Brassicaceae family, Dontostemon pinnatifidus shares characteristics with other plants in this family, such as mustard and cabbages.
uses: Dontostemon pinnatifidus is a plant species that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever and inflammatory diseases.
